channel.title: 2026 on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in 2026 on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: SECL Grade C Various Post Vacancy 2026
item.description: SECL Recruitment 2026 has been released for a total of 1055 vacancies for Mining Sirdar, Dy. Surveyor, and Assistant Foreman posts. The online application process starts from 15 April 2026 and the last date to apply is 14 May 2026. Candidates with 10th pass, Diploma, or relevant technical qualifications can apply. The selection will be done through a CBT exam. The salary offered is ₹47,330 per month, and both male and female candidates are eligible to apply.

item.title: NPCIL Executive Trainee Vacancy 2026
item.description: NPCIL Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 is a Central Government PSU job offering 330 Executive Trainee (ET) posts. Candidates must have BE/B.Tech with minimum 60% marks and a valid GATE 2024/2025/2026 score to apply. The application process will start from 10 April 2026 and end on 30 April 2026. Selection will be based on GATE score shortlisting followed by a personal interview. Selected candidates will receive a ₹74,000 per month stipend during training and will be appointed as Scientific Officer/C after successful completion of training.
